races.analysis_summary: Field reduced by scratches. Coco Dior brings the best form lines, having placed on heavy ground previously and coming off a solid second at this track. Derry City Felix is the main danger despite the wide draw, as the smaller field helps offset the barrier disadvantage.

selections.name: Coco Dior
selections.reason: Proven ability to handle wet tracks (placed Heavy) and comes off a strong 2nd at this track. Maps perfectly.

selections.name: Derry City Felix
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 2nd and 4th to start career. Will relish the going but barrier is tricky.

selections.name: Kittano (NZ)
selections.reason: Resuming with decent trial form. Previous heavy track experience is limited but stable is capable.

selections.name: My Country Boy
selections.reason: Lightly raced improver stepping up in trip. Place chance.

danger_horse.name: Derry City Felix
danger_horse.reason: Has shown enough ability to win this if he can overcome the wide gate.

races.analysis_summary: A decimated field with multiple key scratchings leaves this wide open. Alabama Showdown has race experience and a good draw. Long Live represents the powerful Maher stable on debut.

selections.name: Alabama Showdown
selections.reason: Has race experience (4th on debut) and draws well. Should handle conditions.

selections.name: Long Live
selections.reason: Ciaron Maher debutant with solid trial form. Watch betting moves closely.

selections.name: Sweet Treasure
selections.reason: Draws the rails and has some experience. Could pinch a place.

selections.name: Button Up
selections.reason: Trialled well enough to suggest a competitive debut run.

danger_horse.name: Long Live
danger_horse.reason: Top stable debutant in a very weak field.

races.analysis_summary: Ride The River is consistent and brings strong form lines. Vantante is a last-start winner who has speed. Tides Turning is a heavy track winner who must be respected in these conditions.

selections.name: Ride The River
selections.reason: Consistent performer who placed 2nd fresh. Drops in class from previous preps.

selections.name: Vantante
selections.reason: Last start winner showing good speed. Maps well from barrier 4.

selections.name: Tides Turning
selections.reason: Proven heavy track winner (1:1-0-0). Conditions suit perfectly.

selections.name: Song For Rosie
selections.reason: Has won on soft going. Place claims in this field.

danger_horse.name: Tides Turning
danger_horse.reason: Specific wet track ability makes her a major threat on a Heavy 9.

races.analysis_summary: Wishful Thinker resumes for the Waterhouse/Bott yard from the inside gate and looks primed. Royal Silver has been consistent without winning. My Proclama handles the wet.

selections.name: Wishful Thinker
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner resuming from barrier 1. Trials have been solid.

selections.name: Royal Silver
selections.reason: Consistent form (2nd, 4th) and draws a soft gate. Major player.

selections.name: My Proclama (NZ)
selections.reason: Placed on heavy previously. Consistent type who will be running on.

selections.name: Any Questions
selections.reason: Improver from the Pride stable. Drawn to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Royal Silver
danger_horse.reason: Knocking on the door and gets the right run here.

races.analysis_summary: Heavy scratches have changed the complexion of this race. Winner Of Kowloon has won on soft and placed on heavy, making him the one to beat. Knight Of Rhodes is a heavy track winner.

selections.name: Winner Of Kowloon
selections.reason: Proven in wet conditions (Won Soft, Placed Heavy). Bjorn Baker stable firing.

selections.name: Knight Of Rhodes
selections.reason: Heavy track winner (1:1-0-0). Drawn perfectly in barrier 2.

selections.name: Harry's Evidence
selections.reason: Ryan/Alexiou runner with ability. Needs to overcome the draw.

selections.name: Vivian's Express
selections.reason: Consistent filly who draws the rails. Place chance.

danger_horse.name: Knight Of Rhodes
danger_horse.reason: Superior wet track stats compared to most of the field.

races.analysis_summary: Shangri La Impact drops significantly in class here. Has G1 form in the past and handles heavy going (2:1-1-0). Should be too classy for this field.

selections.name: Shangri La Impact (NZ)
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. G1 placed previously and loves heavy ground (2:1-1-0).

selections.name: Exceed Perfection
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner who will be on speed. Tough to get past.

selections.name: Smart Cry
selections.reason: Last start winner in good form. Handles the conditions.

selections.name: Bianca Mia
selections.reason: Consistent filly coming off a 2nd placing. Drawn well.

danger_horse.name: Exceed Perfection
danger_horse.reason: Tactical speed on a heavy track is always dangerous.

races.analysis_summary: Audenzia won well at this track/dist last start and handles soft. Gooloo Bucky is also a last start winner. Graceful Ellen brings winning form. Competitive race.

selections.name: Audenzia
selections.reason: Last start winner at this track and distance. Proven on soft going.

selections.name: Gooloo Bucky
selections.reason: Last start winner who maps well from barrier 2. In career best form.

selections.name: Graceful Ellen
selections.reason: Another last start winner. Drawn the pole and handles wet tracks.

selections.name: Dumebi
selections.reason: Drops in grade. Has ability if he can handle the heavy surface.

danger_horse.name: Gooloo Bucky
danger_horse.reason: Winning form is good form and gets a soft run.
